payload.title: Random Event Weighting & Pseudo-Random Distribution for Game Economy
payload.summary: Core capability for implementing weighted random events and pseudo-random distribution in game economy systems. Enables fair loot drops, controlled probability events, and dynamic reward balancing while maintaining player engagement and preventing burnout.

content.problem_solved: Pure random distribution in games creates frustration (too many bad rolls) or boredom (predictable patterns). This gene provides mathematical frameworks for weighted random events with controlled variance, pseudo-random sequences that prevent streaks, and dynamic adjustment based on player progression.
key_algorithms: Weighted random selection with probability distribution
Adaptive difficulty scaling based on player performance
RNG fairness verification and streak prevention
use_cases: Loot drop tables with tiered rarity
Random event generation in strategy games
Daily reward systems with streak bonuses
